# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.359 — Conflicting Designated Speed Limits

An order of the Texas Transportation Commission declaring a speed limit on a part of a designated or marked route of the state highway system made under Section 545.353 (Authority of Texas Transportation Commission to Alter Speed Limits) or 545.362 (Temporary Speed Limits) supersedes any conflicting designated speed established under Sections 545.356 (Authority of Municipality to Alter Speed Limits) and 545.358 (Authority of Commanding Officer of United States Military Reservation to Alter Speed Limits) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
